message:
🐛 Fix 8 test failures from CSRF header addition (#10029)

* 🐛 Relax rate limits for normal usage patterns (#9969)

The apiLimiter (200 req/min) was too aggressive for a dashboard with 226
API routes and SWR refresh cycles. A single page load fires 30-50+
requests, and background polling quickly exhausted the budget.

The publicLimiter (60 req/min per IP) was similarly tight for users
behind shared NAT hitting /api/active-users, /api/youtube/playlist,
and /api/medium/blog.

Changes:
- apiLimiter: 200 → 600 requests/min per user+IP
- publicLimiter: 60 → 120 requests/min per IP

Auth limiter (10/min) and feedback limiter (10/hr) remain unchanged.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>

* 🐛 Fix 8 test failures from CSRF header addition (#10025)

Update test assertions to match production code changes from PR #10022:
- Add X-Requested-With header expectation in useFederationActions tests
- Update SSE URL expectations from LOCAL_AGENT_HTTP_URL to /api/mcp/ prefix
- Switch security-issues tests from authFetch mock to fetch stub (fetchBackendAPI)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>

---------

Signed-off-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
